title: The Poor Simp
writer: Sarah Y. Mason, J. Shakespeare Sap
actors: Owen Moore, Nell Craig, Harry L. Rattenberry
plot: Melville Carruthers finally decides to propose to his girlfriend Grace and sets out for her house, but gets a sudden attack of shyness and stops in at a café to calm himself. A fight erupts and Melville is knocked out. He wakes up...
